user_request: Execute approved plan — apartment data pipeline rebuild (multi-collector → shared AI extractor with tri-state attributes → cross-source unification → canonical apartments). QStash for async, pgvector for matching.
approved_decisions: existing_listings_data: fresh start, drop old table
tri_state_storage: hybrid (nullable boolean per amenity + jsonb extras)
madlan_scope: follow-up, not in this PR

intent.goal: Replace flat listings table with three-layer pipeline (raw_posts → extractions → canonical_apartments) supporting tri-state amenity attributes and cross-source apartment unification.
non_goals: Adding the Madlan collector (deferred to follow-up)
constraints: Must run on Vercel (60s function limit; longer for cron/webhooks)
Cost-conscious — content_hash short-circuits re-extraction of unchanged content
acceptance_criteria: All 6 new tables exist; vector extension enabled; old listings table dropped
Shared extractApartment(rawText, sourceType) extracts core fields + 11 tri-state booleans
/api/jobs/extract and /api/jobs/unify routes accept QStash signed payloads
Cross-source duplicates merge automatically at ≥0.95 confidence; 0.7–0.95 land in merge_candidates; <0.7 create new canonical
Yad2/Apify/Extension collectors only insert raw_posts and enqueue; no normalization in collectors
bun run ci passes (typecheck + tests + knip + prettier)

normalized_phases.title: Schema foundation
normalized_phases.objective: Define new pipeline tables in Drizzle, write idempotent destructive reset migration, push schema, enable pgvector. Preserve auth/preferences/aiUsage/monitoredGroups tables.
checks: bun run typecheck
bun run db:push
psql verify all 6 new tables exist
psql verify vector extension enabled
normalized_phases.exit_criteria: Schema applied without error; 6 new tables present; vector extension enabled; auth/preferences/aiUsage/monitoredGroups intact; old listings table dropped.

normalized_phases.title: Shared extraction schema + extractor
normalized_phases.objective: Define ExtractionSchema (Zod) in packages/shared reusing AMENITY_KEYS. Build extractApartment(rawText, sourceType) using generateObject + AI Gateway, with aiUsage cost tracking.
checks: bun run typecheck
Unit test: golden fixture (Yad2-shaped + FB-shaped raw text) → extractor returns Zod-shaped output with at least core fields populated
Unit test: invalid LLM response is rejected
normalized_phases.exit_criteria: Extractor compiles, types align with the new extractions table, dual-model escalation supported, recordAiUsage tagged 'pipeline.extract'.

normalized_phases.title: Queue + extract worker
normalized_phases.objective: Wrap QStash publish/verify. Implement /api/jobs/extract worker route that consumes signed QStash payloads, runs extractApartment, writes extractions, sets raw_posts.extraction_status=done, enqueues unify job. Add QSTASH env vars to env.ts.
checks: bun run typecheck
Unit test: queue.ts publish/verify wrapper
Unit test: /api/jobs/extract rejects unsigned payloads, processes signed payloads end-to-end with mocked extractor
normalized_phases.exit_criteria: Worker writes a valid extraction row given a raw_post_id; rejects bad signatures; unify enqueue is called on success.

normalized_phases.title: Unification + worker
normalized_phases.objective: Implement match_key generation, candidate search via match_key + phone + pgvector cosine, scoring, auto-merge ≥0.95 / review queue 0.7–0.95 / new canonical <0.7. Truth-resolution rule for canonical_attributes (TRUE wins, FALSE wins, conflicts → NULL + flag).
checks: bun run typecheck
Unit test: match_key generation handles missing/partial address
Unit test: ≥0.95 path merges into existing canonical and updates canonical_attributes
Unit test: 0.7–0.95 path inserts merge_candidate
Unit test: <0.7 path creates new canonical_apartment
Unit test: TRUE/FALSE conflict resolves to NULL
normalized_phases.exit_criteria: All unit tests pass; types align with schema; pgvector cosine query works against test fixtures.

normalized_phases.title: Collector simplification + judge rewire + cleanup
normalized_phases.objective: Strip per-source normalization. Yad2/Apify/Extension only produce RawPost and enqueue. Delete fbNormalize.ts and dedup.ts. Rewire judge.ts to read canonical_apartments + canonical_attributes. Update webhooks/cron to enqueue extraction jobs.
checks: bun run ci (typecheck + tests + knip + prettier)
Manual: trigger Yad2 cron locally → rows land in raw_posts only, extraction job is enqueued
Manual: trigger Apify webhook locally → same behavior
normalized_phases.exit_criteria: ci passes; collectors do no normalization; judge runs against canonical_apartments; no orphan imports.

normalized_phases.title: UI rewire + admin merge queue
normalized_phases.objective: Rewire all UI/routes that query listings to read canonical_apartments. Build admin merge-queue page gated by getCurrentAdmin().
checks: bun run ci
Manual UI: dashboard loads, listing detail loads, admin merge queue loads and approve/reject works
normalized_phases.exit_criteria: ci passes; admin merge queue functional; no broken UI links to dropped tables.

deferred: Downstream typecheck failures (Listing/listingId references) in apps/web/src/{admin,agent,feedback,listings,pipeline}/* — owned by P5
Pre-existing typecheck failures in auth.ts/auth-client.ts/middleware.ts (Cannot find module 'better-auth/...') — predate P1
drizzle-kit push:auto initial-pass quirk on feedback/judgments/sent_alerts; second push fixed it — note for P5/P6 verifier

reviewer.summary: All P1 plan requirements met; 34/34 schema tests pass; FK cascades audited; tri-state semantics verified; pgvector(768) correct.
deferred: (M) sent_alerts.canonical_id lacks .references() — matches pre-P1 sent_alerts.listing_id pattern; flag if downstream phases need referential integrity
(m) apartment_sources.extraction_id lacks standalone index for reverse lookups
(m) apartment_sources test does not assert FK target tables
(m) canonical_attributes test does not assert tri-state nullability of has_* columns explicitly
(m) bigserial PK paired with integer FK — pre-existing convention, revisit if any table approaches 2.1B rows

hunter.summary: P1 schema is shippable as-is for a not-yet-live system. 3 HIGH pre-existing tooling concerns; 1 MEDIUM (HNSW index) tracked for P4; 1 MEDIUM (40 files referencing legacy listings) is P5 known scope.
high_issues_detail: HIGH-1: manual_gemini_model_swap.sql is not idempotent on fresh DB (unguarded UPDATE on preferences). Pre-existing. Fix: wrap in to_regclass guard.
HIGH-2: apply-manual-migrations.ts swallows all Postgres NOTICE messages (onnotice: () => {}). Pre-existing. Fix: log notices.
HIGH-3: db:push:auto chain has no post-push schema verification. Pre-existing. Fix: add verify-schema.ts script.
deferred_to_p5: MEDIUM-4: 40 files referencing legacy listings/Listing/listingId — P5 scope

verifier.summary: All 7 P1 phase-exit checks reconciled with concrete evidence on a live Supabase Postgres. Drizzle-kit second-pass FK-rebind quirk empirically reproduced and resolved during verification (judgments/feedback/sent_alerts now have canonical_id only).
verifier.key_observation: drizzle-kit may need TWO push invocations to apply FK-rebound table DDL after destructive resets — first pass prints DDL but doesn't fully apply; second pass completes. P1 scope confirmed shippable.

builder.name: db:push applies schema to live Supabase Postgres
builder.expected: exit 0; 6 pipeline tables present; vector extension present; listings table NULL; auth/preferences/aiUsage preserved
builder.actual: exit 0; 6/6 pipeline tables; vector extension yes; listings NULL; ai_usage 614 rows preserved

verifier.name: schema.ts compiles in isolation
verifier.expected: 0 errors in src/db/schema.ts & schema.test.ts; downstream errors localized to P5 scope
verifier.actual: 0 errors in P1 surface; 36 errors confined to 13 documented downstream files (P5 scope)

verifier.name: db:push idempotency
verifier.command: cd apps/web && bun run db:manual && DRIZZLE_PUSH_NO_STRICT=1 bunx drizzle-kit push
verifier.actual: all 4 manual_*.sql ok; drizzle-kit applied feedback/judgments/sent_alerts FK-rebind DDL; [✓] Changes applied

verifier.name: 6 new pipeline tables exist
verifier.command: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN (...6 names...)

verifier.name: pgvector enabled + extractions.embedding=vector(768)
verifier.command: SELECT 1 FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='vector'; pg_attribute on extractions.embedding

verifier.name: auth/preferences/aiUsage/monitoredGroups intact
verifier.command: SELECT COUNT(*) on each of 7 tables
verifier.actual: user=0, session=0, account=0, verification=0, preferences=0, ai_usage=614 rows preserved, monitored_groups=1

status_history.reason: TDD RED 1 → GREEN 0; live db:push succeeded; 6 pipeline tables verified; vector extension enabled; listings dropped; auth/preferences/aiUsage preserved
All P1 plan requirements met; 0 critical issues; medium observations deferred
0 critical, 3 HIGH (all pre-existing tooling hygiene); shippable as-is for not-yet-live system
7/7 phase-exit checks reconciled with concrete evidence on live Postgres; FK-rebind quirk empirically reproduced and resolved
Phase exit gate passed; advancing phase_cursor P1 → P2
